vocabulary.en: having a good reason for something
vocabulary.excerpt: he thought the shooting was justified.
vocabulary.example_cn: 他认为枪击是正当的。

vocabulary.en: lasting for a long time or slow to end
vocabulary.excerpt: Brouillette previously reported lingering cognitive issues after a serious head injury.
vocabulary.example_cn: Brouillette此前报告称，在严重头部受伤后存在持续的认知问题。

vocabulary.en: said or thought to be true but not proven
vocabulary.excerpt: Brouillette's ex-wives also described a history of alleged domestic abuse and intimidation.
vocabulary.example_cn: Brouillette的前妻们还描述了涉嫌家庭虐待和恐吓的历史。

vocabulary.en: to verify something without relying on others
vocabulary.excerpt: CNN has not independently confirmed that Brouillette was the officer who discharged the weapon.
vocabulary.example_cn: CNN尚未独立确认Brouillette是开枪的警官。

vocabulary.en: force that is likely to cause death or serious injury
vocabulary.excerpt: the officer used deadly force because they feared for public safety.
vocabulary.example_cn: 该警官使用了致命武力，因为他们担心公共安全。

vocabulary.en: to take legal action against a person or organization
vocabulary.excerpt: He sued the Maine Community College system because of that injury.
vocabulary.example_cn: 他因那次受伤起诉了缅因社区学院系统。

vocabulary.en: an injury to the head
vocabulary.excerpt: he had suffered lingering cognitive issues after he suffered a serious head injury.
vocabulary.example_cn: 他在遭受严重头部受伤后出现了持续的认知问题。

vocabulary.en: a long piece of steel used in construction
vocabulary.excerpt: a steel beam fell on his head during a training exercise.
vocabulary.example_cn: 在一次训练中，一根钢梁掉在了他的头上。

vocabulary.en: a document certifying that someone is qualified to fight fires
vocabulary.excerpt: a training exercise for a firefighting certificate.
vocabulary.example_cn: 一次消防证书的训练演习。

vocabulary.en: a woman to whom one was formerly married
vocabulary.excerpt: Brouillette's ex-wives also described a history of alleged domestic abuse.
vocabulary.example_cn: Brouillette的前妻们还描述了涉嫌家庭虐待的历史。

vocabulary.en: a claim or assertion that someone has done something illegal or wrong
vocabulary.excerpt: he denies the allegations.
vocabulary.example_cn: 他否认这些指控。

vocabulary.en: a formal declaration that someone is guilty of a criminal offense
vocabulary.excerpt: We have not been able to confirm any criminal convictions or charges.
vocabulary.example_cn: 我们无法确认任何刑事定罪或指控。

vocabulary.en: a person who comes to live permanently in a foreign country
vocabulary.excerpt: an ICE officer shot and killed an immigrant behind the wheel.
vocabulary.example_cn: 一名ICE官员开枪打死了一名坐在方向盘后面的移民。

vocabulary.en: the length of time that something lasts
vocabulary.excerpt: the fourth killing this year alone by federal immigration authorities.
vocabulary.example_cn: 仅今年一年，联邦移民当局就发生了第四起杀人事件。

vocabulary.en: the final match of the FIFA World Cup
vocabulary.excerpt: Spain and Argentina are going to battle it out in the World Cup final.
vocabulary.example_cn: 西班牙和阿根廷将在世界杯决赛中一决胜负。

vocabulary.en: so strong that it seems almost physically real
vocabulary.excerpt: the excitement is palpable.
vocabulary.example_cn: 兴奋之情溢于言表。

vocabulary.cn: 管弦乐与重金属（比喻风格迥异）
vocabulary.en: a metaphor for contrasting styles, one refined and complex, the other aggressive and loud
vocabulary.excerpt: People are comparing it to orchestra versus heavy metal.
vocabulary.example_cn: 人们将其比作管弦乐与重金属。

vocabulary.cn: 一级特殊活动评估等级
vocabulary.en: the highest level of security designation for an event
vocabulary.excerpt: This is a SEAR 1 event.
vocabulary.example_cn: 这是一级特殊活动评估等级事件。

vocabulary.en: an area where drones are not allowed to fly
vocabulary.excerpt: It's a no drone zone.
vocabulary.example_cn: 这是一个禁飞无人机区域。

vocabulary.en: sudden flooding caused by heavy rain
vocabulary.excerpt: Flash flooding follows days of smoke & heat in New York.
vocabulary.example_cn: 纽约在经历了数天的烟雾和高温后出现了暴洪。

vocabulary.en: an apartment located in the basement of a building
vocabulary.excerpt: officials urged people living in basement apartments to move to higher floors.
vocabulary.example_cn: 官员敦促住在地下室公寓的人搬到更高的楼层。

vocabulary.en: the highest amount of rain ever recorded in a given period
vocabulary.excerpt: Record rainfall yesterday.
vocabulary.example_cn: 昨天创下了降雨量纪录。

vocabulary.en: smoke produced by wildfires
vocabulary.excerpt: All the wildfire smoke infiltrating the Midwest.
vocabulary.example_cn: 所有野火烟雾正在渗入中西部。

vocabulary.en: the degree to which the air is clean or polluted
vocabulary.excerpt: air quality today looking much better at the stadium.
vocabulary.example_cn: 今天体育场的空气质量看起来好多了。

vocabulary.en: a violent storm with very strong winds that move in a circle
vocabulary.excerpt: even an isolated tornado can't be ruled out.
vocabulary.example_cn: 甚至不能排除孤立的龙卷风。

vocabulary.en: the region of the Earth near the equator
vocabulary.excerpt: to the south of their trouble in the tropics as well.
vocabulary.example_cn: 在南方，热带地区也有麻烦。

vocabulary.en: aircraft that fly into hurricanes to collect data
vocabulary.excerpt: The hurricane hunters with NOAA going to be flying into the system.
vocabulary.example_cn: NOAA的飓风猎人将飞入该系统。

vocabulary.en: something that causes or brings rain
vocabulary.excerpt: regardless of development or not, it's a rainmaker just along the coastline.
vocabulary.example_cn: 无论是否发展，它都是沿海地区的降雨制造者。

vocabulary.en: rainfall amounts that occur in isolated areas
vocabulary.excerpt: that could lead to some isolated accumulations.
vocabulary.example_cn: 可能导致一些局部累积。

vocabulary.en: the act of sending a person accused of a crime to another country for trial
vocabulary.excerpt: The Tate brothers have been arrested in the U.S. and are facing extradition to the U.K.
vocabulary.example_cn: 泰特兄弟在美国被捕，面临被引渡到英国。

vocabulary.en: the illegal trade of people for sexual exploitation
vocabulary.excerpt: British prosecutors accused the brothers of rape, sex trafficking, and other offenses.
vocabulary.example_cn: 英国检察官指控兄弟俩强奸、性贩卖和其他罪行。

vocabulary.en: contamination with the parasite Cyclospora
vocabulary.excerpt: Taylor Farms is recalling iceberg lettuce due to potential cyclospora contamination.
vocabulary.example_cn: Taylor Farms因潜在的环孢子虫污染召回冰山生菜。

vocabulary.en: an outbreak of the disease caused by Cyclospora
vocabulary.excerpt: linked to the cyclosporiasis outbreak in the Midwest.
vocabulary.example_cn: 与中西部环孢子虫病爆发有关。

vocabulary.en: a facility used to house computer systems and associated components
vocabulary.excerpt: protest against the building of data centers took place across the country.
vocabulary.example_cn: 反对建设数据中心的抗议活动在全国范围内发生。

vocabulary.en: the simulation of human intelligence by machines
vocabulary.excerpt: supporters argued these facilities are vital to expanding technology like artificial intelligence.
vocabulary.example_cn: 支持者认为这些设施对于扩展人工智能等技术至关重要。

vocabulary.en: the process of choosing delegates for a convention
vocabulary.excerpt: Troy Jackson dominated the first day of Maine's two-day delegate selection process.
vocabulary.example_cn: Troy Jackson在缅因州为期两天的代表选举过程的第一天占据主导地位。

vocabulary.en: a working-class person who cuts down trees for a living
vocabulary.excerpt: The blue-collar logger and former state Senate president captured a large majority of the delegates.
vocabulary.example_cn: 这位蓝领伐木工和前州参议院议长赢得了绝大多数代表的支持。

vocabulary.en: a political message advocating for social reform
vocabulary.excerpt: with his progressive message.
vocabulary.example_cn: 凭借他的进步主义信息。

vocabulary.en: the practice of charging excessively high prices by corporations
vocabulary.excerpt: I believe that we can take on corporate price gouging and lower costs for working families.
vocabulary.example_cn: 我相信我们可以应对企业价格欺诈，降低工薪家庭的成本。

vocabulary.en: to form or join a labor union
vocabulary.excerpt: workers deserve the freedom to unionize without intimidation, retaliation, or fear.
vocabulary.example_cn: 工人有权在不受恐吓、报复或恐惧的情况下成立工会。

vocabulary.en: the act of frightening or threatening someone
vocabulary.excerpt: without intimidation, retaliation, or fear.
vocabulary.example_cn: 没有恐吓、报复或恐惧。

vocabulary.en: action taken in return for an injury or offense
vocabulary.excerpt: without intimidation, retaliation, or fear.
vocabulary.example_cn: 没有恐吓、报复或恐惧。

vocabulary.en: a position of control or advantage
vocabulary.excerpt: he's in a really, really commanding position.
vocabulary.example_cn: 他处于非常主导的地位。

vocabulary.en: a rapid nomination process
vocabulary.excerpt: all the candidates in this SNAP-nominating race have tried to hitch themselves to Platner's progressive policies.
vocabulary.example_cn: 所有参加这次快速提名竞选的候选人都试图与Platner的进步政策挂钩。

vocabulary.en: to attach oneself to something or someone for support or advantage
vocabulary.excerpt: all the candidates in this SNAP-nominating race have tried to hitch themselves to Platner's progressive policies.
vocabulary.example_cn: 所有参加这次快速提名竞选的候选人都试图与Platner的进步政策挂钩。

sentences.en: CENTCOM says it wrapped up an eighth night of strikes against Iran, targeting Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Forces behind attacks that killed two U.S. service members in Jordan on Friday.
sentences.cn: 美国中央司令部表示已结束对伊朗的第八晚打击，目标是周五在约旦造成两名美军士兵死亡的袭击背后的伊斯兰革命卫队部队。
sentences.structure: 主句（CENTCOM says）+ 宾语从句（it wrapped up...）+ 现在分词短语（targeting...）作状语 + 定语从句（that killed...）修饰attacks
sentences.analysis: 这是一个复合句，主句是CENTCOM says，后面是省略that的宾语从句。宾语从句中，现在分词短语targeting...作伴随状语，其中behind attacks是介词短语修饰Forces，而that killed...是定语从句修饰attacks。

sentences.en: What the United States was targeting overnight were missile storage and drone storage facilities along the Strait of Hormuz.
sentences.cn: 美国夜间打击的目标是霍尔木兹海峡沿岸的导弹和无人机储存设施。
sentences.structure: 主语从句（What the United States was targeting overnight）+ 系动词（were）+ 表语（missile storage and drone storage facilities...）
sentences.analysis: 这是一个主语从句作主语的句子。What引导的主语从句在句中作主语，谓语动词用复数were，因为表语是复数名词。

sentences.en: It's not clear how much this latest salvo of overnight operations from the United States has damaged Iran's ability to interdict shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.
sentences.cn: 目前尚不清楚美国这轮最新夜间行动在多大程度上削弱了伊朗阻断霍尔木兹海峡航运的能力。
sentences.structure: 形式主语It + 系动词is + 表语not clear + 真正主语从句（how much...）
sentences.analysis: 这是一个形式主语句型，真正的主语是how much引导的从句。从句中，主语是this latest salvo，谓语has damaged，宾语是Iran's ability，不定式to interdict...作定语修饰ability。

sentences.en: Brouillette told a court in Maine that he suffered lingering cognitive issues after he suffered a serious head injury, leaving him unable to complete that training.
sentences.cn: 布鲁耶特向缅因州法院表示，他在一次严重头部受伤后出现了持续的认知问题，导致他无法完成训练。
sentences.structure: 主句（Brouillette told a court in Maine）+ 宾语从句（that he suffered...）+ 现在分词短语（leaving...）作结果状语
sentences.analysis: 主句是Brouillette told...，后面是that引导的宾语从句。从句中包含一个after引导的时间状语从句。现在分词短语leaving him unable...作结果状语，表示头部受伤导致的结果。

sentences.en: The Department of Homeland Security says he was trying to flee the scene, and an ICE officer shot him, quote, "fearing for public safety."
sentences.cn: 国土安全部表示，他当时试图逃离现场，一名ICE官员开枪击中了他，引用其说法是“担心公共安全”。
sentences.structure: 主句（The Department of Homeland Security says）+ 宾语从句（he was trying... and an ICE officer shot him...）
sentences.analysis: 主句是The Department of Homeland Security says，后面是省略that的宾语从句，由and连接两个并列分句。quote "fearing for public safety"是插入语，说明开枪的理由。

sentences.en: What I keep hearing out of the White House is the same kind of things I heard during the Iraq and the Afghan war, but we've destroyed so much.
sentences.cn: 我不断从白宫听到的是我在伊拉克和阿富汗战争期间听到的同样的话，但我们已经摧毁了这么多。
sentences.structure: 主语从句（What I keep hearing out of the White House）+ 系动词（is）+ 表语（the same kind of things）+ 定语从句（I heard...）+ 并列句（but we've destroyed so much）
sentences.analysis: 这是一个并列复合句。第一个分句中，What引导的主语从句作主语，表语the same kind of things后面省略了关系代词that的定语从句。第二个分句由but连接，表示转折。

sentences.en: From Iran's perspective, though, as many of us who've watched Iran for a very long time said before these attacks by the U.S. and Israel even began, Iran is a society built on the strength of martyrdom and the strength of sacrifice.
sentences.cn: 然而，从伊朗的角度来看，正如许多长期观察伊朗的人在美国和以色列发动这些攻击之前就说过的那样，伊朗是一个建立在殉难和牺牲力量之上的社会。
sentences.structure: 状语（From Iran's perspective）+ 插入语（as many of us... said...）+ 主句（Iran is a society...）
sentences.analysis: 这是一个复杂句。主句是Iran is a society...，前面是介词短语作状语。as引导的定语从句修饰整个主句，其中包含一个who引导的定语从句修饰many of us，以及一个before引导的时间状语从句。

sentences.en: And that spells everything from people willing to smuggle goods to Iran, to nation states like China and Russia, who are already Iranian allies, willing to do whatever they can to keep the Iranian government going, because remember, that's also tiring the U.S. out.
sentences.cn: 这意味着从愿意向伊朗走私货物的人，到像中国和俄罗斯这样的国家（它们已经是伊朗的盟友），都愿意尽其所能维持伊朗政府的运转，因为请记住，这也让美国筋疲力尽。
sentences.structure: 主句（And that spells everything from... to...）+ 定语从句（who are...）+ 现在分词短语（willing to...）+ 原因状语从句（because...）
sentences.analysis: 主句是that spells everything from... to...，其中from... to...列举了范围。who引导的非限制性定语从句修饰China and Russia。willing to...是形容词短语作定语修饰nation states。because引导原因状语从句，其中remember是插入语。

sentences.en: What Spain did is they put together a game plan where they were so defensively sound, their structure was so solid, and they really prevented France from getting a lot of openings on attack.
sentences.cn: 西班牙所做的是制定了一个比赛计划，他们的防守非常稳固，结构非常坚实，并且他们确实阻止了法国获得很多进攻机会。
sentences.structure: 主语从句（What Spain did）+ 系动词（is）+ 表语从句（they put together... where...）
sentences.analysis: 这是一个主语从句作主语的句子。What Spain did是主语，is是系动词，后面是省略that的表语从句。表语从句中包含一个where引导的定语从句修饰game plan，定语从句中由三个并列分句组成。

sentences.en: And I think especially if Spain can get an early goal or can get a lead, it's going to be much harder for Argentina to come back today than it has been in previous games.
sentences.cn: 而且我认为，特别是如果西班牙能早早进球或取得领先，阿根廷今天想要逆转将比之前的比赛困难得多。
sentences.structure: 主句（I think）+ 宾语从句（especially if... it's going to be...）
sentences.analysis: 主句是I think，后面是省略that的宾语从句。宾语从句中包含一个if引导的条件状语从句，主句是it's going to be much harder...，其中包含一个比较结构than it has been...。

sentences.en: The U.S. launched another round of strikes on Iran Saturday in retaliation for the death of two U.S. soldiers.
sentences.cn: 美国周六对伊朗发动了又一轮打击，以报复两名美国士兵的死亡。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾 + 时间状语 + 目的状语
sentences.analysis: 主语：The U.S.；谓语：launched；宾语：another round of strikes；时间状语：on Iran Saturday；目的状语：in retaliation for the death of two U.S. soldiers。

sentences.en: CENTCOM says it targeted Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps forces behind attacks that killed two U.S. service members in Jordan on Friday.
sentences.cn: 中央司令部表示，其目标是杀害两名美国军人的袭击背后的伊斯兰革命卫队部队。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾 + 宾语从句（主谓宾 + 定语从句）
sentences.analysis: 主句：CENTCOM says；宾语从句：it targeted Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps forces；定语从句：that killed two U.S. service members in Jordan on Friday 修饰 attacks。

sentences.en: CNN has confirmed that David Brouillette was among the officers at the scene, but CNN has not independently confirmed that Brouillette was the one who discharged his weapon.
sentences.cn: CNN已确认David Brouillette是现场警官之一，但CNN尚未独立确认Brouillette是开枪的人。
sentences.structure: 并列句，每个分句包含宾语从句
sentences.analysis: 第一分句：CNN has confirmed that...；第二分句：CNN has not independently confirmed that...；第二个that从句中包含定语从句who discharged his weapon修饰the one。

sentences.en: What has emerged is a troubling picture that raises serious questions about how ICE is doing its training and its officer vetting as they race to meet the demands of the Trump administration's immigration crackdown.
sentences.cn: 浮现出的是一幅令人不安的画面，它引发了关于ICE如何进行培训和官员审查的严重质疑，因为他们急于满足特朗普政府移民打击行动的要求。
sentences.structure: 主语从句 + 系表结构 + 定语从句 + 状语从句
sentences.analysis: 主语从句：What has emerged；系动词：is；表语：a troubling picture；定语从句：that raises serious questions about...；状语从句：as they race to meet...。

sentences.en: Brouillette's ex-wives also described a history of alleged domestic abuse and intimidation, all of this in court filings, where he denies the allegations.
sentences.cn: Brouillette的前妻们还描述了涉嫌家庭虐待和恐吓的历史，所有这些都在法庭文件中，他在文件中否认了这些指控。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾 + 同位语 + 定语从句
sentences.analysis: 主句：Brouillette's ex-wives also described a history of alleged domestic abuse and intimidation；同位语：all of this in court filings；定语从句：where he denies the allegations 修饰 court filings。

sentences.en: The attack follows deadly strikes by the Ukrainians deep into Russia, destroying two e-commerce warehouses, one of them in Moscow.
sentences.cn: 此次袭击之前，乌克兰人深入俄罗斯境内发动了致命打击，摧毁了两个电子商务仓库，其中一个在莫斯科。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾 + 伴随状语
sentences.analysis: 主语：The attack；谓语：follows；宾语：deadly strikes；伴随状语：destroying two e-commerce warehouses, one of them in Moscow。

sentences.en: This is the same company that supplied shredded lettuce to Taco Bell restaurants that have been linked to the cyclosporiasis outbreak in the Midwest.
sentences.cn: 这家公司正是向塔可钟餐厅供应切碎生菜的公司，这些餐厅与中西部环孢子虫病爆发有关。
sentences.structure: 主系表 + 定语从句（嵌套定语从句）
sentences.analysis: 主句：This is the same company；定语从句1：that supplied shredded lettuce to Taco Bell restaurants；定语从句2：that have been linked to the cyclosporiasis outbreak in the Midwest 修饰 Taco Bell restaurants。

sentences.en: Troy Jackson dominated the first day of Maine's two-day delegate selection process on Saturday, capturing a large majority of the delegates with his progressive message.
sentences.cn: Troy Jackson在周六缅因州为期两天的代表选举过程的第一天占据主导地位，凭借他的进步主义信息赢得了绝大多数代表的支持。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾 + 伴随状语
sentences.analysis: 主语：Troy Jackson；谓语：dominated；宾语：the first day of Maine's two-day delegate selection process；伴随状语：capturing a large majority of the delegates with his progressive message。

sentences.en: I believe that we can take on corporate price gouging and lower costs for working families.
sentences.cn: 我相信我们可以应对企业价格欺诈，降低工薪家庭的成本。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾 + 宾语从句
sentences.analysis: 主句：I believe；宾语从句：that we can take on corporate price gouging and lower costs for working families。

sentences.en: All the candidates in this SNAP-nominating race have tried to hitch themselves to Platner's progressive policies and his sort of organizing momentum.
sentences.cn: 所有参加这次快速提名竞选的候选人都试图与Platner的进步政策和他的组织势头挂钩。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾 + 不定式短语
sentences.analysis: 主语：All the candidates；谓语：have tried；宾语：to hitch themselves to Platner's progressive policies and his sort of organizing momentum。

topics.title: U.S.-Iran Conflict
topics.content: 美国与伊朗之间的军事冲突升级，美国连续第八晚对伊朗发动打击，伊朗则对科威特、巴林等美国盟友发动导弹和无人机袭击。两名美军士兵在约旦遇袭身亡，另一人失踪。美国中央司令部称打击目标是伊斯兰革命卫队。分析认为冲突可能持续，伊朗利用其地区代理人和民众的牺牲精神进行持久战。
topics.keywords: Iran, U.S. strikes, retaliation, CENTCOM, Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, Strait of Hormuz, Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan, service members killed

topics.title: Maine Shooting and ICE Protests
topics.content: 缅因州一名25岁哥伦比亚裔男子Johan Sebastian Duran Guerrero被ICE官员枪杀，引发反ICE抗议。涉事警官David Brouillette被曝有家暴史和头部受伤导致的认知问题。国土安全部称该男子试图逃离现场，ICE官员因担心公共安全开枪。
topics.keywords: Maine shooting, ICE, protest, David Brouillette, domestic abuse, cognitive issues, Johan Sebastian Duran Guerrero

topics.title: Canada Wildfires and U.S. Air Quality
topics.content: 加拿大近千起野火燃烧，烟雾飘入美国中西部和东海岸，影响超过1亿人。特朗普威胁对加拿大征收关税，安大略省省长福特反驳称美国应记得加拿大曾帮助加州灭火。纽约等地在烟雾和高温后遭遇暴洪。
topics.keywords: wildfires, Canada, smoke, air quality, Trump, tariffs, Doug Ford, flash flooding, New York

topics.title: World Cup Final 2026
topics.content: 2026年世界杯决赛在阿根廷和西班牙之间进行，比赛在新泽西举行。阿根廷力争卫冕，西班牙防守稳固。赛前恶劣天气导致航班延误，球迷滞留。决赛将有明星表演，特朗普将出席并颁发奖杯。
topics.keywords: World Cup final, Argentina, Spain, Lionel Messi, Lamine Yamal, New Jersey, Shakira, Trump, flight delays

topics.title: Tate Brothers Arrest
topics.content: 社交媒体影响者Andrew和Tristan Tate在迈阿密被捕，面临英国引渡请求。英国检察官指控他们强奸、性交易等罪行。兄弟俩否认不当行为。
topics.keywords: Tate brothers, arrest, extradition, UK, rape, sex trafficking, Miami

topics.title: Russia-Ukraine War Escalation
topics.content: 俄罗斯对乌克兰发动大规模弹道导弹和无人机袭击，基辅遭40多枚导弹和120多架无人机攻击。乌克兰此前对俄罗斯境内目标发动无人机打击，摧毁两个电商仓库。战争似乎进一步升级。
topics.keywords: Russia, Ukraine, ballistic missiles, drones, Kyiv, escalation, retaliation, Zelenskyy

topics.title: Michigan Senate Primary
topics.content: 密歇根州民主党参议员初选竞争激烈，Abdul El-Sayed与Haley Stevens争夺接替退休参议员Gary Peters的席位。El-Sayed与伯尼·桑德斯和AOC集会，批评企业和大财团影响政治。
topics.keywords: Michigan, Senate primary, Abdul El-Sayed, Haley Stevens, Bernie Sanders, AOC, Gary Peters

topics.title: Lettuce Recall
topics.content: 泰勒农场因潜在的环孢子虫污染召回运往27个州的冰山生菜。该公司此前曾向塔可钟供应生菜，与中西部环孢子虫病爆发有关。
topics.keywords: Taylor Farms, iceberg lettuce recall, cyclospora, contamination, Taco Bell
